name: Lands
description: Claim chunks, trust friends, federate into nations. Wars are off until the reputation integration ships.

name: Reputation
description: In-house. Cowboy reputation system. Pacifist knockout, wanted outlaws, lawman badge, real-item bounties.

name: mcMMO
description: 19 skills with passive bonuses and active abilities. Full version, no lite mode.

name: Graves
description: In-house. Dying drops your inventory into a grave. Despawns the moment you empty it.

name: Heads
description: In-house. Player heads drop from PvP kills only. Trophies for actual fights.

name: Border
description: In-house. World border grows daily from combined playtime, scaled to active-player count.

name: Tab
description: In-house. Custom tab list with session/all-time playtime, deaths, ping, and server TPS (ticks per second; 20 is smooth). Feeds the playtime data the border expansion reads.

name: Stats API
description: In-house. Local HTTP server feeding the website's live leaderboards, border status, and wanted list.

name: Mail
description: In-house. Send messages or items to offline players. Both arrive on their next login.

name: Trade
description: In-house. Two-window trade GUI between players. Both sides confirm before items swap.

name: Announcements
description: In-house. Rotating chat tips and announcements on a timer.

name: CoreProtect
description: Block logging and rollback. Grief protection and investigation tool.

name: LuckPerms
description: Group-based permissions for staff and rep tiers.

name: BlueMap
description: Live web-based world map at map.pvpers.us with real-time player positions and claim outlines.

name: Simple Voice Chat
description: Proximity voice chat. Hear nearby players, fade out at range. Walkie-talkies and group channels supported. Client mod required (pre-installed in both modpacks).
